summary: Comprehensive testing of Bank2Tally SaaS 6 major updates completed. All new features working correctly with 91.3% backend success rate and 95% frontend success rate.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Transaction ID extraction from upload response needs improvement
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Update/bulk update tests fail when transaction_id not properly extracted
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Fixed by fetching transactions after upload completion

passed_tests: Backend: Async upload with job polling (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: Duplicate file detection via SHA-256 hash (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: DB-backed master ledgers CRUD operations (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: Import ledgers from Tally XML (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: Mark as Ready for Tally sync (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: Get pending sync transactions (NEW FEATURE)
Backend: User authentication and registration with default ledger seeding
Backend: Dashboard statistics and health check
Frontend: Async upload with job polling UI (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: Transaction table with serial number column (#) (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: Single checkbox column, no blank 'D' column (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: Advanced filter panel with date/type/keyword/mapped filters (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: KPI cards with dynamic filtered subtotals (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: 'Mark as Ready for Tally' button replacing Export XML (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: Ledgers page with Add/Delete/Import from Tally XML (NEW FEATURE)
Frontend: Rules page using DB-backed ledgers (NEW FEATURE)
